stream_note: stream:true fails on the Node (npx) runtime with 'tryTargetsRecursively error: immutable' - Portkey-AI/gateway#1389 (open; same class as #1550, fixes #1390/#1551 unmerged as of 2026-07): an upstream bug in the shipped artifact, not a harness gap
hardware: AWS m7g.4xlarge (Graviton3, 16 cores / 64 GB). Gateway-under-test pinned to 4 cores (the comparable basis); mock and load generator on 6 cores each so the mock never bottlenecks the streaming sweep. Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
